sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n83969" key="*plouta/rxeios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Πλουτάρχειος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n83969.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">by Plutarch,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">βίοι</foreign> Men.Rh.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0541.tlg001:p.392S" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.392S.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
